EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} removed the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to create a user on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} blocked the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to remove the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to block the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to change the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} unblocked the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to unblock the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
